reviews.review_description: Very good start for the software. Never thought I'd be able to sculpt on Quest like this. Keep it up.

The fidelity of the  scenes/models you can make on the Quest is limited, but even like that it's an amazing tool for quick VR sculpts and fills a niche that Openbrush/Tiltbrush and Gravity Sketch hadn't covered! Highly recommended!

Tried it and it has potential but for now, unless it is my quest, it is very shimmery on the model or any piece you create. some ridulously so.
some of the clay? out of the tools are too slow to fill so drawing a line takes longer then it should.
But I feel it has a lot of potential despite my complaints.
the cube starts off around 4ft squared but you can enlarge it, so you could do a lifesize model if you so wished.
Painting your model is easy enough as well.
you can change the environment although very basic, the red grass one is alright.
So needs work but could be great.
